status_placed_headline: Waiting for the shop to ship
status_placed_detail: The shop will ship your items within 10 days. We'll update this page once they're on the way.
status_placed_future: Your order will be confirmed here.
status_shipped_domestic_headline: On the way to our warehouse
status_shipped_domestic_detail: Your items have left the shop and are heading to our warehouse. Once received, we'll ship them internationally as soon as possible.
status_shipped_domestic_future: The shop will ship your items to our warehouse.
status_shipped_international_headline: Your order is on its way!
status_shipped_international_detail: Your order has been shipped from Japan. You can track the delivery using the tracking number below.
status_shipped_international_future: We'll ship your order to you from Japan.
cancelled_message: This order has been cancelled. If you have any questions, please contact our support team.
shipping_pending: Shipping details will appear here once your order has been dispatched internationally.
help_message: If you have any questions about your order, please don't hesitate to contact us.
error_not_found_title: Your order page is being prepared
error_not_found_message: This page may take up to 1 hour to become available after placing your order. Please check back shortly.
error_forbidden_message: This link appears to be invalid. Please use the link provided in your email.
error_generic_message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
